spec_match.rationale: Perfect integration of new MediaStreamTrackProcessor.totalFrames and discardedFrames properties under real track processing scopes.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Captures webcam stream, registers track reader loops, introduces manual consumer latency delays via input sliders, and updates status panels dynamically.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly proves how consumer delays force frames to drop before pull calls can be processed by the reader.

edge_cases.rationale: Catches webcam request faults and unsupported browser engines gracefully.

references.rationale: Includes a direct ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses high-contrast monospace metrics tables and standard borders.

summary: The pipeline-meter is an excellent live pipeline benchmark demonstrating how real camera tracks drop frames under synthetic consumers latency delays.
